assertion_results.text: Tasks target both 'trustify-backend' and 'trustify-ui' repositories with at least one task per repo
assertion_results.evidence: Tasks 1-3 have '## Repository\ntrustify-backend'. Tasks 4-7 have '## Repository\ntrustify-ui'. Backend: task-1-sbom-comparison-model-and-service.md, task-2-sbom-comparison-endpoint.md, task-3-sbom-comparison-integration-tests.md. Frontend: task-4-frontend-api-client-and-hook.md, task-5-sbom-comparison-page.md, task-6-sbom-list-compare-action.md, task-7-frontend-comparison-tests.md.

assertion_results.text: Backend tasks have lower task numbers than the frontend tasks that depend on them
assertion_results.evidence: Backend tasks are numbered 1, 2, 3. Frontend tasks are numbered 4, 5, 6, 7. Task 4 (frontend) explicitly depends on Task 2 (backend): 'Depends on: Task 2 — SBOM comparison endpoint (the backend endpoint this client calls)'. Task 2 depends on Task 1. All backend task numbers are strictly lower than all frontend task numbers.

assertion_results.text: Frontend tasks reference Figma design context mentioning specific PatternFly components and visual specifications
assertion_results.evidence: Task 5 (SbomComparePage) extensively references Figma design specs and PatternFly components: 'PatternFly Select component with variant="typeahead"', 'PatternFly Button with variant="primary"', 'PatternFly Dropdown with two DropdownItems', 'PatternFly ExpandableSection', 'PatternFly Badge showing the count with the color specified in the Figma context: green for Added Packages and Resolved Vulnerabilities, red for Removed Packages and New Vulnerabilities, blue for Version Changes, yellow for License Changes', 'PatternFly composable Table (TableComposable, Thead, Tbody, Tr, Th, Td)', 'PatternFly EmptyState with CodeBranchIcon', 'PatternFly Skeleton placeholders'. Task 6 references 'PatternFly Button with variant="secondary"' and 'PatternFly Tooltip'.

assertion_results.text: At least one frontend task explicitly depends on a backend task in its Dependencies section
assertion_results.evidence: Task 4 (trustify-ui) has Dependencies section: 'Depends on: Task 2 — SBOM comparison endpoint (the backend endpoint this client calls)'. Task 2 is a trustify-backend task.

assertion_results.text: Frontend tasks reference paths from repo-frontend.md; backend tasks reference paths from repo-backend.md
assertion_results.evidence: Backend tasks reference paths from repo-backend.md: 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/summary.rs', 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs', 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/get.rs', 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs', 'common/src/error.rs', 'common/src/db/query.rs', 'entity/src/sbom_package.rs', 'entity/src/sbom_advisory.rs', 'tests/api/sbom.rs', 'tests/api/advisory.rs'. Frontend tasks reference paths from repo-frontend.md: 'src/api/models.ts', 'src/api/rest.ts', 'src/api/client.ts', 'src/hooks/useSbomById.ts', 'src/hooks/useSboms.ts', 'src/pages/SbomListPage/SbomListPage.tsx', 'src/components/SeverityBadge.tsx', 'src/components/FilterToolbar.tsx', 'src/routes.tsx', 'src/App.tsx', 'tests/mocks/handlers.ts', 'tests/e2e/sbom-list.spec.ts'. No cross-contamination found.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name (not multiple repos per task)
assertion_results.evidence: All 7 tasks have a '## Repository' section with exactly one repository name: Tasks 1-3 contain only 'trustify-backend', Tasks 4-7 contain only 'trustify-ui'. No task lists multiple repositories.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections as required by the handoff contract in task-description-template.md
assertion_results.evidence: All 7 task files contain: '## Description' (Task 1 line 4, Task 2 line 4, Task 3 line 4, Task 4 line 4, Task 5 line 4, Task 6 line 4, Task 7 line 4), '## Acceptance Criteria' (Task 1 line 37, Task 2 line 31, Task 3 line 33, Task 4 line 32, Task 5 line 41, Task 6 line 24, Task 7 line 34), and '## Test Requirements' (Task 1 line 49, Task 2 line 37, Task 3 line 39, Task 4 line 39, Task 5 line 56, Task 6 line 32, Task 7 line 41).

assertion_results.text: File paths in Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths from the corresponding mock repository structure manifests (repo-backend.md or repo-frontend.md), not invented paths
assertion_results.evidence: Task 3 (trustify-backend) lists in Files to Modify: 'tests/api/mod.rs or equivalent test module root'. The file 'tests/api/mod.rs' does not exist in repo-backend.md. The manifest shows 'tests/api/sbom.rs', 'tests/api/advisory.rs', 'tests/api/search.rs', and 'tests/Cargo.toml' but no 'mod.rs' under tests/api/. This is an invented path not present in the repository structure manifest.

assertion_results.text: Implementation Notes in every task reference specific file paths and code patterns from the repository, not abstract or generic guidance
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1: references 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/summary.rs and details.rs', 'PackageSummary struct in modules/fundamental/src/package/model/summary.rs', 'AdvisorySummary in modules/fundamental/src/advisory/model/summary.rs', 'entity/src/sbom_package.rs', 'common/src/db/query.rs'. Task 2: references 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/get.rs for handler structure', 'common/src/error.rs', 'common/src/model/paginated.rs'. Task 3: references 'tests/api/sbom.rs', 'tests/api/advisory.rs', 'modules/ingestor/src/service/mod.rs', 'modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs'. Task 4: references 'src/api/models.ts' naming conventions like 'SbomSummary, AdvisorySummary', 'src/api/client.ts', 'src/hooks/useSbomById.ts'. Task 5: references 'src/components/SeverityBadge.tsx', 'src/hooks/useSboms.ts', 'src/components/FilterToolbar.tsx', specific PatternFly component mappings from Figma. Task 6: references 'src/pages/SbomListPage/SbomListPage.tsx', 'src/components/FilterToolbar.tsx'. Task 7: references 'tests/mocks/handlers.ts', 'tests/setup.ts', 'tests/e2e/sbom-list.spec.ts', 'src/pages/SbomListPage/SbomListPage.test.tsx'.
